arts.ttl: Premier League legend opens door for former Tottenham and England star Dele Alli who has not played a competitive game in almost two years
arts.sum: Dele has been struggling with injuries and off-the-pitch issues in the last two years. The midfielder said earlier this year that he had been targeting a spot at the 2026 World Cup with England.

arts.ttl: Southampton sack Martin after 5-0 loss to Spurs
arts.sum: Russell Martin has been sacked as head coach of Southampton following the team's disappointing start to the Premier League season.

arts.ttl: Martin departs Southampton after heavy loss to Spurs
arts.sum: Martin, 38, took charge of Southampton in July 2023, helping them earn promotion through the playoffs to the Premier League in his first season at the helm. Southampton have announced the departure of manager Russell Martin .

arts.ttl: Tottenham fans are worried about what Djed Spence was spotted doing after 5-0 win over Southampton
arts.sum: Djed Spence made his long-awaited Premier League debut for Tottenham Hotspur and the defender marked it with an assist and clean sheet. Spence’s chances in...

arts.ttl: Southampton part company with manager Russell Martin
arts.sum: Southampton part company with manager Russell Martin after a 13th Premier League defeat of the season against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Russell Martin sacked by Southampton an hour after horror Tottenham defeat
arts.sum: Martin departs with Southampton bottom of the table and nine points from safety

arts.ttl: Southampton finally sack Russell Martin as boss pays price for Spurs thrashing
arts.sum: Russell Martin was relieved of his duties with Southampton rock bottom of the Premier League following their thrashing to Tottenham on Sunday night

arts.ttl: Southampton sack manager Martin after Spurs thrashing
arts.sum: Southampton sack manager Russell Martin after a 5-0 thrashing by Tottenham on Sunday leaves the club nine points off Premier League safety.

arts.ttl: Tottenham fans are still criticising Ange Postecoglou after beating Southampton with Dejan Kulusevski point made
arts.sum: The Tottenham boss just cannot win sometimes 🤣

arts.ttl: How Timo Werner performed in his cameo appearance vs Southampton after Ange Postecoglou criticism
